title: ScoringResult
description: A rubric scoring result. When variantLabel is null, this is a single-run result and the four A/B fields (winner, delta, confidence, pValue) are also null. When comparing two variants, a comparator populates all four A/B fields.

variantLabel.description: Null for single-run results. Set to 'control' or 'treatment' in A/B comparisons.

winner.description: Null for single-run results. Set by a comparator when comparing two variants.

delta.description: Score difference (treatment − control). Null for single-run results.

confidence.description: Statistical confidence in [0, 1]. Null for single-run results.

pValue.description: p-value in [0, 1]. Null for single-run results.
